title: Add OLS logo to application branding

requirements.text: Add the uploaded OLS logo image (IMG-20260223-WA0852.jpg) to the application as the primary branding logo, displaying it in the header/navigation area of the Layout component
acceptanceCriteria: The OLS logo image is rendered as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated
The Layout component header displays the OLS logo in place of or alongside the current 'OLS' text branding
The logo has appropriate sizing and spacing to maintain visual balance in the header
The logo is clickable and navigates to the home page when clicked
The logo displays correctly on both mobile and desktop viewports

constraints: Do not modify the mobile authentication hook (useMobileAuth.ts)
Do not modify the actor hook (useActor.ts)
Do not edit immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding multiple logo variants or alternate logos

required: OLS marketplace logo with shopping cart icon, colorful 'OLS' text (purple, orange, green), and magnifying glass, featuring 'On-Line Selling' tagline below. Use the uploaded image IMG-20260223-WA0852.jpg as reference (ols-logo.dim_400x300.png)
